metadata.description: Official AgentMark agent skill for Claude Code. Auto-generated from agentmark-ai/agentmark.

plugins.name: agentmark
plugins.description: Build, debug, and ship AgentMark prompts, datasets, experiments, and evals. Use when working with .prompt.mdx files, agentmark.json, agentmark.client.ts, agentmark_client.py, .agentmark/, or imports from @agentmark-ai/*; user runs or asks about npx agentmark <cmd>; user mentions AgentMark or asks about prompt versioning, dataset experiments, prompt evaluations, prompt deployments, or trace observability in an AgentMark project.
